summary: Scaffold scripts/export.py: constants (SCHEMA_VERSION, EMBEDDING_MODEL, EMBEDDING_DIM), git_sha(), main() frame, gzip output, BEGIN/COMMIT wrapper, DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ... CASCADE, inline canonical schema

resolution.note: scripts/export.py scaffold runs end-to-end; emits header/BEGIN/DROP/schema/COMMIT with stubs for the four child tickets that implement data. Produces 0.00 MB gzip with valid structure. export/ gitignored.
